About this item

  • Pack of 3 Black Acrylic Plexi Circle Round Disc Acrylic Display Base Size: 6Inch x 6Inch x 3mm Thickness
  • PRECISION CUT WITH SMOOTH EDGES: They are made from a crystal clear acrylic material Precision laser cut clear acrylic sheet, feature as precision.
  • PROTECTIVE FILM: No scratches, no sharp edges acrylic discs have a protective film on both sides that should be peeled off when you are ready to use the blank, This protective covering helps keep the acrylic blank from being scratched or getting dirty.
  • MULTI-USE: You can drill or cut it to your need for your DIY projects. Multi purpose as you like, you can use the acrylic round to paint, engraving, cake stand, cake decorations, make wedding calligraphy sign, welcome signs. It also can protect table surface from collecting dust.
  • WHAT YOU WILL GET: package includes 3 pieces round acrylic sheets for DIY project use. round acrylic sheet has a white protective film on both sides, please tear off the film before using the product to get a transparent acrylic

Product description

Acrylic Round Sheet Disc Circles Transparent Panel Sign Blank This transparent Acrylic disk are made of high quality acrylic. The edges of the acrylic are polished and smooth for holding. These round acrylic sheet sign is designed for many uses like cake displays, cake holders, making signs, scrapbooking, drawing, painting, display, table tops, DIY projects ornaments making pendants and other things you can think of.Features:Can be applied as display stand, cake base, palettes, table top protector, schedule panel, table sign and more. Made of clear acrylic which is durable and not easy to break. Easy to clean with water or wipe with a wet cloth. Protective film on both sides, peel them off before using.

PRODUCT FEATURES:
  • These blank circles are full of possibility decorations ornaments, display , Coaster, DIY Ornaments, jewelry, magnets, keychains, whatever you can dream up You are only limited by your imagination.
  • Kindly pay the attention that you need tear off the protective film on the plastic circle sheet before no , they are high clear ,surely no marks no duty points .
  • High Clear Acrylic Material , Acrylic plastics can be used as replacements for glass in many products, with varying degrees of visual and constructive qualities.
  • You can use any water or oil based paint pen to write on it. Easily wipe off with acetone. meanwhile also can stick custom vinyl design to create sign stand. Also can draw on it to make your crafts .
PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS:
  • BRAND: Whittlewud
  • PRODUCT: Pack of 3 Acrylic Black Round Discs
  • COLOUR: Black
  • SUITABLE FOR: The Acrylic Sheet recommended for Home & Kitchen
  • DIMENSIONS: 6INx6INx3MM
TAGS:

acrylic plexiglass sheet, Acrylic Sheet 3mm, colour plates for acrylic painting, colour palette for kids, Round shape acrylic sheet

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Product description

Acrylic Round Sheet Disc Circles Transparent Panel Sign Blank This transparent Acrylic disk are made of high quality acrylic. The edges of the acrylic are polished and smooth for holding. These round acrylic sheet sign is designed for many uses like cake displays, cake holders, making signs, scrapbooking, drawing, painting, display, table tops, DIY projects ornaments making pendants and other things you can think of.Features:Can be applied as display stand, cake base, palettes, table top protector, schedule panel, table sign and more. Made of clear acrylic which is durable and not easy to break. Easy to clean with water or wipe with a wet cloth. Protective film on both sides, peel them off before using.

PRODUCT FEATURES:
  • These blank circles are full of possibility decorations ornaments, display , Coaster, DIY Ornaments, jewelry, magnets, keychains, whatever you can dream up You are only limited by your imagination.
  • Kindly pay the attention that you need tear off the protective film on the plastic circle sheet before no , they are high clear ,surely no marks no duty points .
  • High Clear Acrylic Material , Acrylic plastics can be used as replacements for glass in many products, with varying degrees of visual and constructive qualities.
  • You can use any water or oil based paint pen to write on it. Easily wipe off with acetone. meanwhile also can stick custom vinyl design to create sign stand. Also can draw on it to make your crafts .
PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS:
  • BRAND: Whittlewud
  • PRODUCT: Pack of 3 Acrylic Black Round Discs
  • COLOUR: Black
  • SUITABLE FOR: The Acrylic Sheet recommended for Home & Kitchen
  • DIMENSIONS: 6INx6INx3MM
